title.en: The Frost Flower Divine Lord asked curiously.

content.en:
Ye Tian was familiar with the four cosmic gods of the Frost Flower Divine Lord, the Seven Sword Divine Lord, the Langya Divine Lord, and the Black Wind Divine Lord, as for these four people, they had already heard of Ye Tian, but they didn't know much about Ye Tian's true combat power.

After all, they had all heard of it before, and they had never seen Ye Tian, nor had they seen a battle with Ye Tian, so they didn't have a specific understanding of Ye Tian's strength.

"Ten Thousand Laws Divine Master, I heard that your strength is very strong, can you talk to us?"

The Frost Flower Divine Lord asked curiously.

"When you meet the creatures of destruction and fight, you will know. I want you to fight in a supportive way, for example, I will attack a lot of destructive creatures, if I am badly damaged, you can make up for them, and kill those destructive creatures! Destroying creatures are very difficult to kill, even if they are badly damaged, it is not easy to kill them with your strength!"

Ye Tian admonished.

"Lord of Ten Thousand Laws, I understand that we also intercepted the destructive creatures last time, so we know something about them!"

The Seven Swords God is the main way.

"That's good!"

Ye Tian nodded lightly.

As time passed, three days passed.

Rumble!!!

The battleship stopped, and the voice of Hitomi Juggernaut came.

"Let's get off the battleship, there are already a lot of destructive creatures in this area, and the battleship can't move any further, otherwise once it is surrounded, then we will be very passive, and we will go in groups of five to intercept the destructive creatures, remember. Don't have too many people working together, or you'll attract a lot of destructive creatures, which will be even more dangerous!"

Hitomi reminded.

Whoa!!

One by one, the cosmic gods flew out of the battleship in a group of five, or in a trio, or in a single action, to intercept the creatures of destruction.

"Let's go too!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!"

The Frost Flower God Lord and the other four answered.

In this team, they are naturally led by Ye Tian, and they will definitely not oppose Ye Tian's arrangement, otherwise once Ye Tian leaves the team, they will not be able to find Ye Tian as a teammate.

They know very well that this time is a crisis far greater than the last.

As cosmic gods, they have an infinite lifespan, and they don't want to die here.

Swish!

The team of five sped forward, flying quickly in one direction.

Soon, a devastating aura came.

"It's a creature of destruction!" said the Frostflower Divine Lord with some nervousness.

Even after experiencing such a battle, she was still a little panicked, but when she thought of Ye Tian here, she gradually calmed down.

"36 Destruction Creatures, 26 Destruction Creatures are Ordinary Universe God Realm, 9 are Universe God Peak Realm, and one is Domination Realm!" Ye Tian said.

"So much!"

The Seven Sword God Lord was surprised.

It stands to reason that their five-person team would be good at most dealing with seven or eight destructive creatures, not to mention dealing with a destructive creature that dominates the realm, which is almost an impossible task, and they can only find other squads to jointly intercept it.

"You don't have to worry, the destruction creature that dominates the realm and the 9 destruction creatures of the peak realm of the universe god are handed over to me, and the other destruction creatures are intercepted by you, and when you hold on for a while, can you do it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!"

The four of them hurriedly said.

They are all powerhouses at the peak realm of the Cosmic God, and it is not a problem to deal with 26 ordinary Cosmic God Destroying Creatures.

"Then let's arrange it like this!"

Ye Tiandao.

Soon, the creatures of destruction came, and as they flew, they devoured everything around them, and countless stars were devoured by them.

Wow!

Ye Tian rushed over for the first time, and his breath locked on the destructive creature that dominated the realm and the destructive creature of the nine-headed cosmic god peak realm.

As for the other creatures of destruction, they were stopped by the Seven Sword Masters and the other four.

The battle broke out in an instant!

"A slit in the sky!"

Ye Tian slashed it with a knife, directly cutting the destructive creature that dominated the realm in half with a single sword, but soon this destructive creature healed again, but its breath was much weaker, and it did not fall.

"This destructive creature should be in the middle stage of domination, its combat effectiveness is not strong, but its life-saving ability is very terrifying!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Puff puff puff!!

Blade lights locked onto this mid-stage destructive creature of domination, completely annihilating its vitality almost in a matter of seconds.

And the destructive creatures of the nine-headed cosmic god peak realm couldn't move just because they were suppressed by Ye Tian's space power.

"Black Lotus Realm!"

Ye Tian unleashed this not very powerful Chaos True Technique, and instantly wiped out this nine-headed Universe God Peak Realm of the Destruction Creature.

After killing these destructive creatures, Ye Tian did not continue to attack, but watched the four cosmic gods deal with the 26 ordinary cosmic god realm destructive creatures.

However, the Frost Flower Divine Lord and the others were extremely surprised.

They also knew about Ye Tian's battle situation, and they were shocked to see Ye Tian kill these destructive creatures so easily, including a destructive creature that dominated the realm.

They thought that Ye Tian would fight with the destructive creature that dominated the middle stage for a while, but they didn't expect to settle the battle so easily.

"We also have to speed up, otherwise it will make the Lord of the Ten Thousand Laws think that we are useless!"

The Seven Swords God Lord transmitted the other three teammates.

And the addition of the word adult to his title is enough to prove that he has more respect for Ye Tian.

After about ten minutes, the four of them finally killed all 26 of the devastating creatures.

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian commented.

"It's too much worse than the Lord of the Ten Thousand Laws!"

The Frost Flower Divine Lord bowed his head and said.

"Let's go, let's continue to look for the creatures of destruction, and I'll try to stop as many creatures of destruction as possible, and you make sure that the other creatures of destruction don't rush out, understand?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!"

The four of them also changed their minds, they no longer sought to kill, but only to stop the destructive creatures and prevent them from escaping.

A team of five is constantly searching for and killing the creatures of destruction in this area.

In the blink of an eye, ten days have passed.

In an area, the five-person team is resting, even Ye Tian can't fight all the time, even if the divine power can't be exhausted, but the energy will be exhausted.

In the past ten days, they didn't know how many times they had fought, and even if the four of them didn't fight much, they had almost squeezed their energy, and Ye Tian had also consumed a lot.

So, they need to trim it up.

And when it was time to trim, Ye Tian turned on the time acceleration, so that there would be no waste of time.

At this time, Ye Tian closed his eyes to recuperate, and the four of the Frost Flower Divine Lord sat there to breathe, and secretly communicated.

"Lord Myriad Dharma is too powerful, we underestimated him far and thought we could help a little, but we didn't expect it to only help some fish from escaping. "

"Yes, the limit of the combat power of the Lord of the Ten Thousand Laws Divine Lord, we still can't see it, at that time, a destructive creature that dominated the peak led five destructive creatures who dominated the early stage of domination, I thought we were finished, but I didn't expect the Lord of the Ten Thousand Laws Divine Lord to kill them all by himself, it's incredible!

"It's our honor to be able to follow behind the Lord of the Ten Thousand Laws, let's have a good rest, in a while, we will have to fight!"

The four of them soon stopped chatting and quietly recuperated.

Time passes slowly –

Ye Tian suddenly opened his eyes and said, "Let's go, continue to fight!"
